title: Healey just signed a major overhaul to the state’s Cannabis Control Commission. Here’s what to know.
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Local News The law restructures the embattled agency and doubles the legal purchase limit to two ounces, among other changes.
A marijuana joint is rolled.
(AP Photo/Marcio Jose Sanchez, File) Gov.

title: Red Sox starter Sonny Gray leaves game early with hamstring injury
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Sonny Gray left the Red Sox game against the Tigers early due to right hamstring tightness after 2.2 innings.
Boston turned to reliever Danny Coulombe after Gray's early exit; the team's bullpen is already under strain.
If Gray is sidelined, prospect Payton Tolle could join the Red Sox rotation, boasting a 3.00 ERA at Triple-A Worcester.

title: Sharon Lokedi notches 2nd-straight Boston Marathon win
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Boston Marathon In a finish line interview, Lokedi said a little girl's shout of "you've got this, ladies!
" fueled her from the sidelines.
Sharon Lokedi of Kenya celebrates after winning the women's division of the Boston Marathon, Monday, April 20, 2026.

title: 13 years after David Ortiz’s iconic speech, Alex Cora reflects on Patriots Day at Fenway Park
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Red Sox "Stuff like that can unite people.
” David Ortiz's speech just five days after the Boston Marathon bombing resonated with a grieving city.
Photo by Jim Rogash/Getty Images By Conor Ryan April 20, 2026 | 12:24 PM 3 minutes to read ShareSend this article to your social connections.

title: Americans sweep handcycling titles at Boston Marathon
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Boston Marathon PA native Zachary Stinson and New England resident Edie Perkins won the men’s and women’s handcycling titles, respectively.
Canada’s May Lim and Julien Pinsonneault won the duo division.
Participants in the handcycling division take their place in front of the starting line in Hopkinton for the Boston Marathon.

title: He’s running Boston to continue his family’s work at The Hoyt Foundation
author: Kelly Chan
bullets: Why I'm Running "My hope is to give the feeling that a person’s disability feels like it disappears through my family’s foundation.
" By Kelly Chan April 20, 2026 | 12:05 PM 1 minute to read In our “Why I’m Running” series, Boston Marathon athletes share what’s inspiring them to make the 26.
2-mile trek from Hopkinton to Boston.

title: John Korir wins the 2026 Boston Marathon in a record time
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: Boston Marathon Korir matched his 2025 triumph with yet another dominant display, breaking the previous course record of Geoffrey Mutai from 2011.
John Korir wins the 2026 Boston Marathon in a new course record time of 2:01:52.
Jessica Rinaldi/Globe Staff By Hayden Bird April 20, 2026 | 11:48 AM 1 minute to read For the second year in a row, John Korir survived an unsteady start to win the Boston Marathon men’s division.

title: Eden Rainbow-Cooper wins 2026 Boston Marathon women’s wheelchair race
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Boston Marathon Rainbow-Cooper, 24, claimed her second Boston Marathon victory Monday.
Eden Rainbow-Cooper summits Heartbreak Hill.

Finn Gomez for The Boston Globe By Abby Patkin April 20, 2026 | 11:20 AM 1 minute to read Eden Rainbow-Cooper won the women’s wheelchair division of the 2026 Boston Marathon Monday, cruising to her second Boston victory in 1:30:51.

title: 76ers coach Nick Nurse calls out ‘absolutely unacceptable’ effort vs. Celtics
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Boston Celtics "A lot went wrong, that's for sure.
" 76ers head coach Nick Nurse during the Game 1 loss to the Celtics.
Winslow Townson/Getty Images The Celtics controlled Game 1 of the Eastern Conference quarterfinal from start to finish, cruising to a 123-91 victory over the 76ers on Sunday.

title: Review and setlist: Lewis Capaldi showcased resilience, humor, and vocal power in return to Boston
author: Kelly Chan
bullets: Concert Reviews After a three-year hiatus from performing, Capaldi was more than happy to be back at MGM Music Hall.
Lewis Capaldi at MGM Music Hall on Sunday, April 19, 2026.
Kelly Chan/Boston.
